subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast acquired illumination from the Divine Lamp! A company of souls, who deemed themselves guides upon the path and means of attainment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مقتبس نور هدی از مصباح الهی جمعی که خود را دلیل راه دانستند و وسیله وصول
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @humility; meekness; lowliness
